title: Creative Co-Op Bowl Shaped Measuring Cups (Set of 4 Sizes)
description:
About this item
From the Urban Homestead Collection
Set of Four Stoneware Nesting Measuring Cups
1.5 Cups (12 oz), 1 Cup (8-oz), 1/2 Cup (4 oz), 1/4 Cup (2 oz)
Each Cup is Marked with Both Cups and Ounces
Whimsical Colors and Design Make this a Great Gift
reviews_5s: These are great in the kitchen. Nesting to save counter space and can also be used as prep dish. Good look.Love this set. I'm vision impaired and these beautiful ceramic cups make measuring hassle free. The bright colors provide contrast against the counter top. The solid feel and shape of the cups make measuring ingredients easy. The 1.5 cup is a must have for most my baking recipes. I make a lot of homemade bread and this set provides all the exact measurements needed.Love this set! It was perfect for my little kitchen and now I’m going to get one to gift to a friend!I was searching for a new measuring cup where you can view the measurement from the top and not the side. I came across these and thought this would work and I wouldn't have to use one cup to measure different liquids in different measurements, rinsing between measurements. I have used them almost daily since I've gotten them. I like how they nestle neatly within each other without handles on the 3 smaller ones, taking up less room in my cabinet. The colors are bright and they can easily be used by children.These are very cute and work great. The biggest one is 1 1/2 cups, which I believe differs from the description, but that's fine with me. I have quite a few recipes that call for 1 1/2 cups. These are dishwasher and microwave safe. I haven't actually put them in the dishwasher but rather just washed them by hand, but I'm sure they would be fine in the dishwasher. I have melted butter and coconut oil in them using the microwave, and it's worked out fine, although, if you microwave more than 30 seconds they do get really hot. But they are super cute and easy to use. I'm trying to remove the toxins from our lives, so making changes little by little. I purchased these to replace plastic measuring cups, and so far, very happy with my purchase.EASY TO USE AND STORE. PERFECT SIZEWork great, would purchase againWas a gift that went over great. Win.Great space saver.Arrived in good condition but not due to USPS leaving on ground by gate where anyone could have taken it
reviews_1s: Sadly one was broken upon arrival. Returned. Very nice and cute though.They aren’t very functional. The fill lines are pretty much at the very top of the cup which means that it’s almost coming out of the spout. Then what you go to pour, it literally spills everywhere! Not a good purchase at allThe fill-line is too close to the rim. I spilled every time I tried to use them. And why have them nesting? Put handles on them. Fix the fill line. The colors are niceA better conversation piece than useful. The numbers are hard to read, and easy to spill the liquid while tying to see the fill line.Bad quality control, one of the cups is marked incorrectly and it’s too late for me to return them.Way too small. It’s more for decoration (and still small for that) than using for use in the kitchen. I was disappointed.In the discription it said measures ozs. and cups. It does not. Only total cups each. Not why I purchsed. Disappointed!One of the cups was broken. The 1/2 green cup.Did not feel was good qualityThese are adorable measuring cups, but unfortunately the measurements are not accurate. I have to double check with a “regular” measuring cup. Also, the pour spouts are angled oddly and when pouring, the liquid runs down the side of the cup and spills everywhere. I have found that I actually have to pour out of the side of the cup to prevent spills. These are a cute set, but not practical for cooking.
